heading: Computation decisions about State amounts expended
label: 13106 Computation decisions about State amounts expended
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1310546:1478Section 13105 prescribes what amounts expended or obligated by a State will be counted toward the State’s share. This section also authorizes the Secretary to settle any dispute over the computations required by this section.
Prior ProvisionsA prior section 13106 was renumbered .section 13107 of this title

children.text: the acquisition, maintenance, and operating costs of land, facilities, equipment, and supplies;
the costs of carrying out the program; and
other expenses that the Secretary considers appropriate.

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary shall decide an issue arising out of the computation made under subsection (a) of this section.
